programme.title: Pinkfong Dinosaur Musical Stories
programme.desc: Did you know that dinosaurs love to sing and dance?

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Learn Colors with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Look what we found! Our friends have discovered mysterious, colorful dinosaur eggs! Place them in the magic incubator and watch them change colors. What kind of mighty dinosaurs will hatch from these rainbow eggs? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Pinkfong Dinolings
programme.desc: Pinkfong Dinolings is back for Season 2 with a brand-new friend, Anca! A colorful new adventure begins as our rainbow-themed little dinos welcome their new buddy. Get ready for a wild and wacky ride as they try to put a bell on the fierce Carnotaurus’s horn and chase after a runaway dino egg! What exciting fun awaits the Dinolings tomorrow? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Big Baby
programme.desc: Uno scienziato progetta una macchina per la trasformazione genetica e il suo nipotino di soli 4 anni si trasforma accidentalmente in un uomo di 30. Il "Bambino" sfugge e corre intorno alla città rincorso dai fratelli che fanno di tutto per recuperarlo prima dell'arrivo dei propri genitori.

programme.title: Jumbo
programme.desc: Jumbo è un elefante che vive su un'isola, è molto intelligente e riesce a sillabare qualsiasi parola. Ogni anno si indice una gara dove partecipano numerosi animali, ciascun partecipante deve sillabare una parola senza sbagliare.

programme.title: Jack Il Ciclone
programme.desc: Jack è tornato e stavolta è alle prese congli half-pipe delle cime innevate del Colorado. Jack fa squadra con due fratelli e diventa presto un campione dello snowboard! Le sue abilità lo portano dove nessuno scimpanzé era stato prima.

programme.title: A spasso con Willy
programme.desc: A seguito della distruzione della loro navicella, il giovane Willy viene separato dai genitori con cui viaggiava nello spazio. La sua capsula di salvataggio atterra su un pianeta selvaggio e inesplorato. Con l’aiuto di Buck, un robot di sopravvivenza, dovrà cavarsela fino all’arrivo dei soccorsi.

programme.title: Alieni in soffitta
programme.desc: È tempo di vacanze estive per la famiglia Pearson. Cala la notte e improvvisamente quattro oggetti luminosi si dirigono verso il tetto. Un gruppo di alieni è alla conquista della casa.

programme.title: Il regno di Wuba 2
programme.desc: Il piccolo Wuba, destinato al trono, si rimette in viaggio in una Cina favolosa, al confine tra il mondo degli uomini e quello dei mostri, separandosi dai propri genitori ma trovando nuovi alleati lungo la via.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: Alvin Superstar 2
programme.desc: Nel secondo fortunato sequel, Alvin Simon e Theodore vanno a scuola dove vengono ingaggiati dalla preside per vincere un concorso musicale. Un gioco da ragazzi per Alvin e il suo gruppo che però non avevano considerato le Chipette: una band di affascinanti scoiattoline.

programme.title: Elle - L'ultima Cenerentola
programme.desc: Un tempo Elle sognava di diventare una cantante famosa, ma ora vive a Los Angeles e lavora per un'etichetta discografica. Un giorno incontra il giovane Ty Parker, una stella del pop. Con l'aiuto dei suoi amici, Elle scoprirà che i sogni possono davvero diventare realtà.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: La programmazione riprenderà a breve
programme.desc: Ci stiamo concedendo un sonno riparatore per tornare più belli di prima! Resta sintonizzato e presto arriveranno altre proposte straordinarie di intrattenimento a cura di Rakuten TV.

programme.title: True and the Rainbow Kingdom
programme.desc: Uno strano cristallo provoca scambi incontrollati in tutto il Regno, compreso lo scambio di corpi tra True e Bartleby.

programme.title: True and the Rainbow Kingdom
programme.desc: True deve salvare il Festival Fundawunda dal precipitare in un adorabile caos quando il bacio magico di un tenero pulcino trasforma anche i visitatori della fiera in pulcini.

programme.title: True and the Rainbow Kingdom
programme.desc: True sostituisce il Re Arcobaleno per un giorno e deve risolvere un problema difficile: fermare il cattivo odore di un animale domestico grande e puzzolente.

programme.title: True and the Rainbow Kingdom
programme.desc: Quando il Re Arcobaleno prende una specie di raffreddore chiamato Wachoogieboogies, le cose cominciano a cambiare colore a ogni starnuto. True e Bartleby devono intraprendere un viaggio epico per trovare la cura.

programme.title: True and the Rainbow Kingdom
programme.desc: Una giornata in spiaggia va storta quando i blubbs marini iniziano a spiaggiarsi a causa del riscaldamento dell’acqua del mare, spingendo True e Bartleby a indagare.

programme.title: True and the Rainbow Kingdom
programme.desc: True aiuta Bartleby a superare la sua ansia nei confronti dei blubbs del cielo mentre insieme cercano di guidare la famiglia di queste creature volanti di ritorno alla loro lontana casa nel freddo nord.

programme.title: Monk Little Dog
programme.desc: Monk fa il bucato Monk al Polo Nord Monk cacciatore di tesori Monk e la videocamera nascosta Monk, il re del king fu Monk viaggia nel tempo Monk si allena

programme.title: Monk Little Dog
programme.desc: Monk solleva i pesi Monk va in motocicletta Monk incontra Quack-Quack Monk festeggia il Natale Monk il mago Monk, Mouch e il mal di denti Monk e il curling

programme.title: Monk Little Dog
programme.desc: Monk e la missione impossibile Monk, maestro di cerimonia Monk gioca a golf Monk gioca ai videogiochi Monk rovina la festa Monk, la stella del cinema Abbiamo perso Monk Monk, il supereroe Monk, Quack-Quack e Little Chick Monk indaga

programme.title: Alvin Superstar: Nessuno ci può fermare
programme.desc: Imbarcati con i tuoi "batuffoli" preferiti, i Chipmunk, in una nuovissima avventura con tanta musica. Quando Alvin, Simon e Theodore credono che Dave li abbia mollati per la nuova fidanzata, si recano a Miami per bloccare la proposta di matrimonio e tenere unita la famiglia.

programme.title: Jumbo
programme.desc: Jumbo è un elefante che vive su un'isola, è molto intelligente e riesce a sillabare qualsiasi parola. Ogni anno si indice una gara dove partecipano numerosi animali, ciascun partecipante deve sillabare una parola senza sbagliare.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: The Duke - Il Duca
programme.desc: Quando Hubert, il fedele compagno a quattro zampe del Duca di Dingwall, eredita le proprietà del Duca, fa squadra con la nipote del Maggiordomo per contrastare alcuni avidi parenti del caro estinto.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Alvin Superstar 2
programme.desc: Nel secondo fortunato sequel, Alvin Simon e Theodore vanno a scuola dove vengono ingaggiati dalla preside per vincere un concorso musicale. Un gioco da ragazzi per Alvin e il suo gruppo che però non avevano considerato le Chipette: una band di affascinanti scoiattoline.

programme.title: Birba - Micio combinaguai
programme.desc: Un gatto di nome Oscar vive da tempo in un grattacielo in città con suo figlio Birba. Un giorno, incuriosito dal mondo esterno, Birba decide di uscire di casa ed avventurarsi alla ricerca di Miciolandia.

programme.title: Il regno di Wuba 2
programme.desc: Il piccolo Wuba, destinato al trono, si rimette in viaggio in una Cina favolosa, al confine tra il mondo degli uomini e quello dei mostri, separandosi dai propri genitori ma trovando nuovi alleati lungo la via.

programme.title: A spasso con Willy
programme.desc: A seguito della distruzione della loro navicella, il giovane Willy viene separato dai genitori con cui viaggiava nello spazio. La sua capsula di salvataggio atterra su un pianeta selvaggio e inesplorato. Con l’aiuto di Buck, un robot di sopravvivenza, dovrà cavarsela fino all’arrivo dei soccorsi.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: Mentre Josh è al college, sua sorella Andrea e Buddy entrano a far parte della squadra di baseball. Ancore una volta, a Buddy viene naturale qualsiasi cosa che includa una palla!

programme.title: Elle - L'ultima Cenerentola
programme.desc: Un tempo Elle sognava di diventare una cantante famosa, ma ora vive a Los Angeles e lavora per un'etichetta discografica. Un giorno incontra il giovane Ty Parker, una stella del pop. Con l'aiuto dei suoi amici, Elle scoprirà che i sogni possono davvero diventare realtà.

programme.title: Space Kids - Eroi della Galassia
programme.desc: In un futuro lontano, un pianeta un tempo rigoglioso è diventato un deserto dopo la distruzione della pianta che ne garantiva la sopravvivenza. Tre giovani eroi decidono di sfidare robot, vulcani e pericoli estremi per trovare l’ultima pianta rimasta e salvare il loro mondo.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Le spie vengono sostituite da un trio di ex spie uscite dalla “pensione”. Ma Clover, Sam e Alex scoprono presto che le intenzioni delle ex spie non sono così benevole. In una storia di serie B, Clover si scontra con un bullo del suo passato che ha appena iniziato a frequentare la Beverly High.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Le spie danno la caccia a un ladro di opere d'arte, ma scoprono che tutti gli indizi portano a un mago apparentemente defunto. In una storia di serie B, le spie accusano Mandy di aver sabotato i loro progetti fotografici.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Un sinistro negozio nei centri commerciali di tutto il mondo rapisce gli acquirenti e li trasforma in terroristi anti-consumo. In una storia di serie B, Alex viene accusata di taccheggio.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Le spie combattono contro un cattivo che ruba le anime ai giovani americani per conservare la propria giovinezza. In una storia di serie B, Sam pensa che i suoi capelli brizzolati comprometteranno le sue possibilità di vincere un Youth Spirit Award.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Un cattivo sostituisce i leader del mondo con animatroni nel tentativo di trasformare il mondo in un gigantesco e pericoloso parco di divertimenti. B-story: Sam affronta la sua paura degli sport estremi.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Un cattivo progetta di congelare il mondo, riportandolo all'Era Glaciale - cancellando i danni che gli esseri umani hanno fatto all'ambiente. Storia B: Clover affronta la sua reputazione di “Regina dei Ghiacci”.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Le spie combattono contro un cattivo che ha rapito le migliori star del cinema mondiale per utilizzarle nel suo film d'azione follemente realistico e pericoloso. In una storia di serie B, Sam viene eletta “Più popolare” nell'annuario scolastico e deve affrontare la vita sotto i riflettori.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Le spie vanno sotto copertura come band d'apertura del tour mondiale della pop-sensation Ricky Mathis per indagare su cosa faccia impazzire i suoi fan.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Le ragazze si recano nella nazione africana di Lyrobia per indagare su uno strano tentativo di rapimento ai danni della regina Tassara: un tentativo di rapimento con un raggio antigravità!

programme.title: Jack Il Primate Più Verticale 2
programme.desc: Dopo essere stato cacciato dalla squadra di hockey, Jack incontra Ben, uno skateboarder ambizioso. Ben scopre che Jack è molto abile con lo skateboard e i due decidono di partecipare a una competizione di skateboard in giro per il paese!

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Ein legendärer Auftritt einer Hardrock-Legende in Hamburg! Diese Aufnahme vereint frisches Material mit zeitlosen Klassikern. Eine musikalische Reise durch mehr als dreißig Jahre Rockgeschichte, die pure Energie und Nostalgie verspricht.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi e Giorgione
programme.desc: Giorgione in trasferta. La famiglia Bicocchi al completo invita Giorgione a San Giovanni Persiceto per trascorrere qualche giorno in compagnia di ricette tradizionali, laide, corrotte e test

programme.title: La mia Sardegna
programme.desc: Terra e vento - Terra fertile e generosa, terra di vento che rinfresca e pulisce. Giuseppe si sposta in Marmilla, a Sanluri terra di grano fin dalle antichità. Dove c’è grano c’è vita, e qui c’è un importante progetto di rinascita enogastronomica del territorio.

programme.title: La mia Sardegna
programme.desc: Il tramonto prima dell'alba - Il viaggio parte da Alghero per arrivare a Capo Caccia ad ammirare uno dei tramonti più suggestivi della Sardegna. Durante il viaggio incontrerà amici chef e vignaioli che racconteranno le loro storie e i loro progetti

programme.title: Una pizza in compagnia

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Barbecuing bananas, that's crazy. Chef Spencer Watts shows us how to grill the delicate, evERS-scrumptious fruit. Bananas.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Fish. Flaky, flavoursome, and perfect for barbeque. High energy host Spencer Watts tests out his grill with delightfully tender fish dishes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Shellfish is delicate, tantalizing, and full of flavour, especially when it's grilled to perfection

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Barbeque is all about sauces, rubs and marinades

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Salsa means undeniable flavour! Lively host Spencer Watts plays with sweet, salty, and spicy in four amazing salsa recipes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Grilling expert Spencer Watts hosts a tasty beef-a-palooza with four incredible beef cuts including smoked brisket and succulent beef tenderloin.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Barbeque is not just about meat! Chef Spencer Watts shows us how to grill fruits and vegetables like a pro.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Charismatic host Spencer Watts shows us why chicken is best on the grill with four irresistible chicken recipes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: There are limitless options with lamb on the grill! Host Spencer Watts offers some tips and tricks on how to prepare four different cuts of lamb.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Whether for a small family dinner or a big backyard barbeque, host Spencer Watts shows us the best ways to grill up tasty duck, turkey, capon, and quail.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Never underestimate the power of a good side or dessert! Fun host Spencer Watts grills up the perfect sides and treats for your next barbeque.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Pork and the grill are good buddies and host Spencer Watts shows us four of his favourite pork recipes that will have you salivating.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Fun and quirky host Chef Spencer Watts kicks off this episode by showing off his knife skills as he sabres a pineapple to start his instant classic; Grilled Fruit Salad. The pineapple joins a mix of bright summer fruits on the grill, then berries, spicy citrus vinaigrette and savoury feta cheese. Next up, Spencer whips up his Hawaiian Chicken recipe. Spiced with cayenne and Chinese five spice, Spencer stuffs flavourful chicken thighs with pineapple and grills it with a delightful ginger and soy sauce. Every bite is sweet, savoury, and fresh - exactly how summer should taste! Then Spencer shares his top tips for adding smoky flavours to pork using an easy and handy smoke pouch. His Apple Smoked Pork Tenderloin is bathed in a fog of applewood smoke and he then tops it with tart apple-blueberry compote. Cinnamon buns are amazing with a bit of orange peel - but have you ever had them in an orange peel and on the grill? That's right and Spencer shows you how you can make fun and flavourful Orange Peel Cinnamon Buns on the barbecue using indirect heat.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Onions, green onions, chives, garlic, and leeks are all members of the same fabulous flowering family, Allium! First up? Chef Watts shows us his sweet and smoky Charred Leeks with Romesco; add grilled toast and you have your next party appetizer! Next up is a main course. Spencer starts with a juicy grilled pork chop, then adds roasted garlic melted into a balsamic onion chutney to make his out-of-this-world Roasted Garlic Pork Chops. Looking for a crowd pleaser that's easy to make? Spencer has a recipe for that! Chicken Yakitori. He threads skewers with crunchy green onions and tender chicken and caramelizes the yakitori sauce as he grills this tasty dish. Are you ready to drool? Spencer shows us how to make Allium your main dish with Stuffed Vidalia Onions. Loaded with savoury bacon, salty blue cheese and garlic, you'll want to eat this dish for every meal!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Have a cheese lover coming over? Blow their minds with some of Spencer's "grate" barbecued cheese recipes! First up, Spencer chars Brie Cheese to an ooey-gooey perfection and tops it with tart cherries and crunchy walnuts, serving it with crispy grilled crostinis. Next up is a Grilled Steak and Caesar with a twist only Spencer could add - grilled... lettuce! Then, Spencer uses the classic German "hasselback" presentation to stuff chicken breasts with verdant spinach, yummy Swiss cheese and pungent sun- dried tomatoes, grilling them to melty perfection. Finally, Spencer fires up his barbecue to make his Grilled Peaches with Salted Bourbon Caramel, a decadent dessert elevated with creamy Mascarpone and perfectly balances sweet, smoky, and salty flavours.

programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke salmon to turn it into pastrami, whip up a colorful Caribbean salad, and grill savory rosemary-seasoned pork chops!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Fun and quirky host Chef Spencer Watts kicks off this episode by showing off his knife skills as he sabres a pineapple to start his instant classic; Grilled Fruit Salad. The pineapple joins a mix of bright summer fruits on the grill, then berries, spicy citrus vinaigrette and savoury feta cheese. Next up, Spencer whips up his Hawaiian Chicken recipe. Spiced with cayenne and Chinese five spice, Spencer stuffs flavourful chicken thighs with pineapple and grills it with a delightful ginger and soy sauce. Every bite is sweet, savoury, and fresh - exactly how summer should taste! Then Spencer shares his top tips for adding smoky flavours to pork using an easy and handy smoke pouch. His Apple Smoked Pork Tenderloin is bathed in a fog of applewood smoke and he then tops it with tart apple-blueberry compote. Cinnamon buns are amazing with a bit of orange peel - but have you ever had them in an orange peel and on the grill? That's right and Spencer shows you how you can make fun and flavourful Orange Peel Cinnamon Buns on the barbecue using indirect heat.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and his team hit fitness central and cook up a grilled feast that is high on protein and lean on fat including Salt Crusted Peel and Eat Shrimp; Lime Chipotle Pork Medallions; Mesquite Smoked Turkey with Peach Glaze and a Sweet and Spicy Black Bean Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill team are pitching in to feed volunteers some great grilled chow including Lime Jalapeno Chicken Wings with Raita Dip; Beef Ribs with Vinegar Bbq Sauce; Killer Bbq Fries with Homemade Ketchup and Some Ice Cold Kiwi Melon Frostys

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and the Team join some friends at a Cottage Party to celebrate the end of school. They keep the festivities going with Bbqed Rib Eye Steaks with a Chimmi Churri Sauce; Jerk Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Fresh Mango; Roasted Garlic Onion Potatoes and Greek Salad in a Pita.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Not only do the racers in the Soap Box Derby have a need for speed, they have a need for BBQ! Matt and the RG team cook up a feast to slow down any speedster. The menu: Smoked Shrimp B.L.T., Pineapple Basil Rotisserie Chicken, Grilled Sweet Potato Pops, and Summer Berry Pudding.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt spends the day by the water; fishing, playing Frisbee, catching some rays. What goes with water and sun? BBQ!!! Matt & his team make a seafood buffet of Grilled Clams in the Shell with Serrano Ham, Smoked Lake Rainbow Trout, Grilled Lobster with Grapefruit Salsa, and Crab-Stuffed Avocados.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt gets down and dirty playing some beach Volleyball. In between bumps, sets, and spikes, the RG team serves up a smorgasbord of great food. The menu: Grilled Chicken Breast on Foccacia with Grilled Apples & Cambozola Cheese, Sezchuan Ribs with Chunky Plum Dipping Sauce, Roasted Corn and Pepper Potato Salad, and Homemade Protein Bars

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Forget bicycle built for two. This Big Bike fits 30 people! Matt & the team join forces with the Heart & Stroke foundation to raise money by riding around a track. Matt feeds these 'bikers' some healthy and delicious grub. The menu: Grilled Calamari, Smoked Turkey Fajitas, Grilled Scallops and Watermelon Salsa, and Cold Gazpacho.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Whether you're a pro or a beginner, everyone is welcome to join the Road Grill team at the 19th tee where Matt is busy burnin' up his Q's. What better way to end your day at the links with an enticing menu of Miso Citrus Grilled Sablefish, Smoked Rack of Pork with a Sour Cherry Sauce , Lemon Basil Smashed Potatoes with Mushrooms, Arugula Salad with Peaches, and Blue Cheese and Walnuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: In between hoisting sails and scrubbing the deck, Matt and his team prepare a feast for the sailors before going on a long voyage. Not only is the weather perfect for sailing, it's perfect for BBQing! The menu: Scallop Corn Bacon Burger, Maple-apple Brined Pork Chops, Grilled Tuna Bruschetta, and Strawberry Marscapone Trifle.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Teddy Bears of all age, shape, and size join our grill team with their owners for a day of games, rides and some teddy bear repair. Matt & the RG team are BBQing a menu even the pickiest eater will love. The menu: Grilled Almond Butter & Banana Sandwiches, Grilled Meatball Sub, Smoked White Cheddar Macaroni, and Quick & Snappy Ginger Lemon Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Llamas, horses, and pigs...Oh My! The RG team lends it support to a farm animal rescue. Matt sets up his grills during a weekend fundraiser and stays friendly to his animal buddies by serving up a vegetarian menu. The menu: Portobello Burger Stack, Smoked Corn Tamale with Goat Cheese& Salsa Fresca, Pizza Salad Sandwich, and Tabbouleh Salad

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: The neighbourhood outdoor pool is a great way to cool down on a hot summer day. Matt and the Grill Team are dipping their feet in the pool, splashing with the kids, and, of course, grilling up some fabulous eats to munch on while playing in the park or relaxing on your towel. The menu: BBQ'd Pork Tenderloin & Pears on Bagels, Grilled Asian Chicken Burger, Surf & Turf Kabobs with Arugula Pesto, and BBQ'd Cinnamon Donuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's graduation day at Chef School and Matt and the Grill team are sharing in the festivities. To congratulate the new Chefs, Matt has cooked up a masterful menu of fancy, yet simple, dishes. The menu: Mixed Seafood Grill on a Plank, Maple Rosemary Rotisserie Chicken, Dunked Hunan Lamb Rack, and Salmon Pastrami.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: The Road Grill team goes rural and gets lost in hedge mazes at Saunders Farm. Luckily, they find their way out in time to cook up some BBQ and feed all families at the farm. The menu: Grilled Chicken Legs with Crunchy Chip Crust, Smoked Ham with Maple Mustard Glaze, Planked Asparagus Bundles with Cheese and Prosciutto, and Cobb Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill Team get in the saddle and get inspired to grill up some BBQ! With a full school of riders to feed they grill up some Wild West plates. The menu: Texas Rockets, Perfect Beef Jerky, Beef Brisket, and Hearty Beet & fennel Salad.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Using just one pot, host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks four delicious dishes including Peachy Pulled Pork Tacos and a Lime and Basil Pie.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Do you know the secret to an uncracked cheesecake? Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco shares her trick to making a perfectly silky-smooth Salted Caramel Cheesecake.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Charming cook Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four multi-cooker dishes that save on time but are bursting with flavour.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four dinners in minutes using her multi-cooker including a delicious Lasagna and mouth-watering Burrito Bowl with Chermoula.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Don't forget to eat your fruits and veggies! Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to include nutritious ingredients into our decadent desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern gives us a sweet taste of chocolate heaven with an overload of chocolatey desserts including a decadent Bombe au Chocolat.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: High tea requires royal desserts! Host Jessica McGovern gives us the lowdown on some sophisticated sweets to pair with a warm cup of tea.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Talented host Jessica McGovern shows us how to impress both kids and adults with three ovERS-the-top desserts including a magical Geode Cake.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Here's a tongue twister: Theresa, tuna, tangerine! In this episode, host Theresa Visintin picks her favourite letter, "T," and introduces us to scrumptious recipes using tuna and tangerine. Theresa loves tuna and Italian cuisine, so naturally she combines both to create a mouth-watering pasta with some savoury tomato, olive, and tuna sauce. Next, Theresa satisfies her sweet tooth with a decadent tangerine parfait! Using the sweet juice of the tangerine, Theresa creates gelatin, with a hint of orange liqueur. She tops it all off by whipping up a fluffy cream to complete this sweet treat. Then it's time for a real challenge: tuna and tangerine in one recipe!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this "H" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to take on the unique flavours of halibut and horseradish. She starts with a perfectly prepared prosciutto wrapped halibut, pairing the buttery flavour of the fish with the saltiness of the cured meat. Throw in some dill potatoes and you've got a beautifully balanced dish. Next up, Chef Lauren show us how to make a delightful roast beef dip with a zesty horseradish sauce using carrots, vinegar, mayo and a little lemon. Finally, she is challenged to make a dish that combines both ingredients, and does she ever deliver!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this letter "P" challenge, Chef Robert Jewell showcases his vegetarian skills using pecans and peppers. Despite his cowboy roots, Robert shows us he can kick it with vegetarians by cooking up a juicy meatless "meatloaf" using pecans. But, no "meatloaf" would be complete without a gravy! Robert fries up earthy portobello mushrooms before adding a special ingredient to thicken the gravy, you guessed it -- pecans! Now, on to peppers. Robert doubles up, using both the vegetable and seasoning, to make a delicious red pepper coulis with herb and pepper crusted beef tenderloin. Robert goes a little nuts when he prepares his final recipe using both pecans and peppers.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Cheese or chocolate? Why not both! In this "C" challenge, host Theresa Visintin takes on both decadent ingredients. But first, she shows us that being cheesy is easy, especially when you stuff chicken breast with creamy goat's cheese and finely diced apples. Theresa takes the flavour one step further by coating the stuffed chicken with sage, parmesan, and panko bread crumbs, then frying it to a crispy golden brown. Next, Theresa whips up a dessert fan favourite, the decadent and oh-so-irresistible dark chocolate lava cake. Finally, Theresa has an irresistible recipe using ooey gooey cheese and warm chocolate.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Endearing host Tyrone Edwards surprises South African-born Shameen Miller with the results of her DNA test. Shameen cooks a meal that combines her two cultures and shares it with her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards shocks Andrea Titus with her DNA results. Blending her two cultures onto one plate, Andrea then cooks up a delicious and revealing meal for her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals to Laird Hercules that his DNA includes other ancestry besides Guyanese. In the DNA Dinners kitchen, he cooks up a delicious meal that combines his known and newfound cultures.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Mary Bosco is Italian, but Host Tyrone Edwards surprises her by revealing that her DNA test includes roots from other places. Mary cooks a special meal for her family that combines her two cultures.

programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern gives us a little surprise on the inside by baking up tasty filled goodies.

programme.desc: Encuentre respuestas en la Palabra de Dios y aprenda a vivir cada día con un propósito mientras Jentezen Franklin presenta la verdad clara que lo inspirará.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack La Verdad Del Evangelio
programme.desc: Andrew Wommack comparte cómo la Palabra de Dios transformó su vida. Él cree que el mismo poder puede obrar para ti.

programme.title: Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: El Dr. David Jeremiah, pastor principal de Shadow Mountain Community Church en El Cajon, California, entrega la Palabra de Dios a un mundo en constante cambio.

programme.title: El Programa de John Ankerberg
programme.desc: Un ministerio de televisión y medios de comunicación comprometido con la defensa de la fe cristiana, que anima al creyente y desafía al escéptico.

programme.title: Pastor Samuel Rodriguez
programme.desc: El pastor Samuel Rodriguez comparte la palabra del señor con enseñanzas, ilustraciones, y verdades que desatan la gloria de Dios en esta generación.

programme.title: Jason Lozano
programme.desc: La misión es llevar el mensaje de libertad a las naciones. A través de ganar almas y hacer discípulos podemos ayudar a las naciones a hacer una vida de libertad

programme.title: Impactando las Naciones
programme.desc: En Impactando Naciones, la Pastora Wanda Rolón comparte mensajes de fe, esperanza y poder espiritual para transformar vidas, familias y comunidades.

programme.title: Ministry Now
programme.desc: La familia Lamb lleva a los espectadores de todo el mundo a Ministry Now. Lleno de fe radical, declaraciones alentadoras y consejos positivos.

programme.title: Adoración en casa
programme.desc: Transforme la atmósfera de lo que sea que esté enfrentando a través del poder de la adoración con Josh Morales.

programme.title: Impactando las Naciones

programme.title: Four Seasons: New Zealand
programme.desc: A look at New Zealand from four different angles: summer, fall, winter and spring.

programme.title: Wairere Falls: New Zealand
programme.desc: The Wairere Falls of New Zealand.

programme.title: Nacpan Beach
programme.desc: Travelling to a beautiful stretch of cream-colored sand with swaying coconut palms and clear waters.

programme.title: Cliffside Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: The thrilling view of a cliff-top lookout of one of Indonesia's most breathtaking spots.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: Hawaii
programme.desc: Spending a restful moment in Maui, a tropical paradise of gleaming white sand beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Hamilton Island Palms
programme.desc: Soaking up the tropical breeze with the stunning palm and coastal vista from the famous Hamilton Island, Australia.

programme.title: Flying Over South Korea
programme.desc: The filmmaker showcases South Korea's natural wonders and urban landscapes by exploring four of the country's most famous destinations: Jeju Island, Seoul, Geoje National Park and Busan.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: An aerial journey to the remote fjords and valleys of eastern Iceland.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a rushing waterfall.

programme.title: The Tranquil Stream
programme.desc: Take in the peaceful, natural beauty of a Pennsylvania stream. Relax as the melodic water flows downstream cradled in the vibrant tree-covered canopy.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Wildlife Wonders of South America
programme.desc: A sunrise at Salar de Uyuni in Bolivia with flamingo and llama scenes from high altitude volcanic salt lakes; welcoming new life in the Chilean landscapes of San Pedro Atacama; the Torres del Paine National Park in Patagonia.

programme.title: Bryce Canyon Relaxation
programme.desc: Admiring the wonders of one of the world's most breathtaking natural destinations: Bryce Canyon, in Utah.

programme.title: Crystal Blue Waves
programme.desc: The sights and sounds of big waves breaking along a coastal pier on a blue-sky day.

programme.title: Peaceful Forest Walk: Quebec
programme.desc: The heart of the Laurentians.

programme.title: Auckland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: The relaxing vibe of a day at the beach, with a tour of the breathtaking coastlines near Auckland.

programme.title: Above & Below the Caribbean
programme.desc: A static scene of Curaçao, Caribbean; featuring swimming fish, passing clouds, and sunshine glistening; filmed by Tilo and Yvonne Kühnast.

programme.title: Relaxing Nature Sceneries
programme.desc: The filmmaker provides a collection of peaceful nature scenes and tranquil vistas that will soothe body and soul.

programme.title: Tranquil Waters: Diablo River
programme.desc: A majestic view of the Diablo River which is surrounded by evergreen mountains.

programme.title: Glistening Island Beach
programme.desc: A big palm tree facing a white sandy beach, glistening blue sea, sunshine, and a small boat; filmed in 4K Ultra High Definition on the hidden island of Nanuku, where a small atoll is surrounded by an untouched lagoon, miles away from it all.

programme.title: Above the Dolomites
programme.desc: Featuring cinematography by new collaborator Ryan Shirley and synchronized to new healing music by Antonio Resende; offering some views that showcase the Dolomites mountain range.

programme.title: Sparkling Californian Coast -- California Coast, U.S.
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the view of sparkling waves crashing over the California coast.

programme.title: Redwood Forest Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Transporting to the magical redwood forests of Northern California and soaking up the healing energies that only pure nature can provide, with multiple healing scenes from the old-grove forest, paired with real-life stereo nature sounds.

programme.title: Crashing Waves: Hawaii
programme.desc: The energizing sound of waves crashing on the shores of Hawaii's Red Sand Beach.

programme.title: Hawaii Palms + Waves
programme.desc: Featuring a scene of coastal palms, green grass and blue waves in the early morning light and a backdrop of stereo nature sounds; shot on location in Oahu, Hawaii at the Turtle Bay Resort.

programme.title: Whispers of the Wilderness
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the stillness of plant life through every stage, from flowers on the cusp of blooming to snow-dusted trees-all set to nature's soothing soundtrack.

programme.title: Muriwai Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: The coast of Muriwai Beach with tides and rushing currents.

programme.title: A Day in the Caribbean
programme.desc: The tropical island of Antigua.

programme.desc: Admiring the wonders of one of the world's most breathtaking natural destinations: Bryce Canyon, in Utah.

programme.title: Glacial Beauty: Newfoundland
programme.desc: Admiring the quiet and glacial beauty of icebergs drifting across the bay at Newfoundland's Amherst Cove.

programme.title: Iceland From Above
programme.desc: Trace the contours of Iceland's rugged landscape from a bird's eye view. Shaped by millions of years of volcanic activity, expect to see fjords, craters, canyons, and more.

programme.title: Flying Over Maui
programme.desc: Soaring high above Maui, Hawaii's exotic coastline and lush interior.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Tumpak Sewu Waterfalls: East Java
programme.desc: A close look at the edge of the tiered, plunging streams of Indonesia's Tumpak Sewu falls.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise
programme.desc: Dive into an undersea world inhabited by the sea turtles; featuring real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for relaxation.

programme.title: Benang Kelambu & Stokel: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experience a waterfall flowing down a forest wall, surrounded by overgrown vines.

programme.title: Cadlao Lagoon: Philippines
programme.desc: Experiencing the beauty of a turquoise lagoon flanked by impressive, vegetation-covered, mountains.

programme.title: Pure Relaxation
programme.desc: Relaxing to the slow descent of the sun over calm waters.

programme.title: Lakeside Campfire
programme.desc: The beauty of a lakeside campfire.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: East Bali
programme.desc: A serene soundtrack amidst a journey to spectacular beaches in Bali.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 2
programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Forest and Mountains, Alaska
programme.desc: A trip to the wilderness in Alaska's thick underbrush, with nothing but trees and snow-capped mountains as a guide.

programme.title: Dazzling Blue Lakeshore
programme.desc: Relaxing on the blue shoreline of New Zealand's famous Lake Pukaki; filmed in January 2017 on New Zealand's South Island.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands
programme.desc: Featuring aerial views of remote South Pacific islands, accompanied by nature sounds and ambient music by Relax Moods; offering a mix of ground-level and bird's-eye perspectives through smooth, continuous shots, concluding with a real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Sunny Sandy Beach: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Unwinding by an idyllic stretch of sand where time stands still surrounded by luxurious flora and light navy blue waters.

programme.title: Wairere Falls: New Zealand
programme.desc: The Wairere Falls of New Zealand.

programme.title: Hidden Tropical Paradise 2
programme.desc: Taveuni and Small Outer Islands of Fiji.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Crete Special
programme.desc: Malini Angelica embarks on a journey through the island of Crete, Greece, uncovering its stunning landscapes, rich culture, and hidden gems that reveal the island’s most authentic side.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slovenia, a small nation of just two million people, is one of Europe’s most surprising delights. Nestled at the crossroads of the Germanic, Mediterranean, and Slavic worlds, it offers a charm all its own.

programme.title: Whats on Food and Culinary Delights
programme.desc: Taste the Mediterranean this week on Whats On. Malta celebrates with Festa Frawli, the Malta International Food Festival, and Festival Ikel Malti. Slovenia serves fine dining at Gourmet Ljubljana, while Italy CousCous Festival blends flavors and cultures. Join us as we explore street food, markets, and culinary workshops that highlight the region rich gastronomic heritage.

programme.title: Hvar (Stari Grad)
programme.desc: The island of Hvar, Croatia’s sunniest spot, is perfect for enjoying a traditional Dalmatian marenda. In the charming town of Stari Grad, restaurateur Damir Čavić welcomed us with a spread of marinated anchovies, octopus salad, pašticada, cod, and vegetables—washed down with a light bevanda.

programme.title: MEMOIRS11THJULY
programme.desc: MEMOIRS11THJULY

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 19
programme.desc: Discover a mix of comforting and traditional flavors in this episode, starting with Pomilorotiania (scrambled eggs with tomato), a simple yet satisfying dish, and finishing with Mahallepi, a creamy and delicate milk pudding. A delightful pairing of savory simplicity and sweet indulgence.

programme.title: Med Nations 12 Lebanon
programme.desc: Lebanon, where the Mediterranean coast meets mountains steeped in history. From the vibrant streets of Beirut to ancient ruins and seaside villages, Lebanon reveals a rich mix of culture, cuisine, and traditions that showcase its unique Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: Mediterranean Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Chef Kurt welcomes Chef Fausto into the kitchen to learn the craft of a Roman icon: authentic Pasta all'Amatriciana, perfected with crispy guanciale and rich pecorino cheese. As they toss the pasta, the duo explores what makes Italian cooking so timeless: simplicity, incredible ingredients and great company.

programme.title: Med Minds 09 Hypatia
programme.desc: Hypatia, the brilliant philosopher of the Mediterranean, became a timeless symbol of knowledge, reason, and courage.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: MEMOIRS11THJULY
programme.desc: MEMOIRS11THJULY

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: Whats On Conferences, Startups and Innovation
programme.desc: A new world is being built right now across the Mediterranean, and we are taking you behind the scenes of the most important meetings of the year. This week, we are at the historic Mediterranean Conference Centre in Valletta for MedTech World, where the conversation has shifted from simple gadgets to responsible AI that doctors and patients can actually trust. We then head south to the incredible energy of AfricaIgnite to meet the founders of high-growth startups in climate tech and finance who are proving that Africa is the new engine of global innovation. Back on the islands, we explore the Startup Malta Festival to see how a pro-business ecosystem is helping entrepreneurs scale their boldest ideas across Europe. Finally, we join the global dialogue at the Finance Malta Conference to see how a focus on quality over quantity is redefining the future of investment and sustainability. This is a journey through the ideas and the people who are turning today's challenges into the success stories of the future.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Into the Med Gozo and Comino Hidden Gems
programme.desc: The adventure begins in the bright waters of the Blue Lagoon and the Crystal Lagoon. Susannah takes us through these amazing natural pools, showing us the raw beauty of Comino.

programme.title: Mediterranean Yoga Calm Your Body
programme.desc: Mediterranean Yoga is a series that blends Embodiment Yoga with the peaceful beauty of the Mediterranean. Set in stunning coastal and natural locations, each episode encourages viewers to reconnect mind and body through gentle movement, breathwork, and mindfulness in a safe and calming space.

programme.title: Acqua da proteggere
programme.desc: With Marco Faimali, director of the CNR's Institute for the Study of Marine Sustainability, we explore the ocean's fragile ecosystem and the need for protection. Anna Pancaldi visits marine protected areas, including the Smart Bay of Santa Teresa and the port of La Spezia, where researchers study "alien species". Finally, we learn about the underwater internet, an innovation from Sapienza University of Rome led by Professor Chiara Petrioli and the WSENSE team.

programme.title: Dates that made History
programme.desc: 399 BC: The Trial of Socrates dramatises the famous trial of the Greek philosopher Socrates, who is charged with corrupting the youth and impiety. The episode delves into Socrates' defence, his philosophical ideas, and his unwavering commitment to his principles. It explores the tension between individual thought and the societal norms of ancient Athens. Through this trial, the show examines the impact of Socrates' ideas on Western philosophy and his legacy.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The tale of Tartarus: The Damned of the Earth descends into the deepest abyss of the Greek underworld, where the most cursed souls are imprisoned. Here dwell legendary figures punished for defying the gods, bound by eternal torment. This dark realm serves as a chilling reminder of divine justice and the price of hubris. A myth that explores punishment, morality, and the shadow side of eternity.

programme.title: Macbeth Part 1
programme.desc: Macbeth Part 1

programme.title: OSN Kubrick - Musica e cinema d'autore
programme.desc: From the Rai Arturo Toscanini Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Min Chung, presents a symphonic concert dedicated to the iconic soundtracks from Stanley Kubrick's films. The programme features orchestral interpretations of memorable scores that have shaped Kubrick's cinematic legacy, blending classical masterpieces with evocative film music for a powerful and immersive experience.

programme.title: Whats On Conferences, Startups and Innovation
programme.desc: A new world is being built right now across the Mediterranean, and we are taking you behind the scenes of the most important meetings of the year. programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

In the charming town of Stari Grad, restaurateur Damir Čavić welcomed us with a spread of marinated anchovies, octopus salad, pašticada, cod, and vegetables—washed down with a light bevanda.

programme.title: MED DST MAKARSKA 15MIN
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Sevilla
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Seville, Spain — a vibrant city in the heart of Andalusia known for its rich Moorish heritage, flamenco music, and stunning architecture. She visits iconic landmarks like the Seville Cathedral, Plaza de España, and the Royal Alcázar, while also discovering local tapas bars and lively streets filled with culture and charm.

programme.title: Memoirs July 12
programme.desc: Memoirs July 12

programme.title: Whats On Books Literature Innovation and Learning
programme.desc: Great ideas are the lifeblood of the Mediterranean and this week we are following them from the written page to the boardroom. We start at the Malta Book Festival, where the local community gathers to celebrate the stories that define the islands. Our journey then takes us to Cyprus for the Nicosia Book Fest to see how literature creates a unique bridge between cultures. In Spain, we wander the famous leafy avenues of the Madrid Book Fair, where Retiro Park becomes one of the largest outdoor libraries in the world. We wrap up at the historic Mediterranean Conference Centre in Valletta for the EU Startup Summit, where the creative energy of storytelling meets the high-stakes world of global innovation. This is a look at the parks and the halls where the next chapter of the Mediterranean is being written.

programme.title: Med Minds 05 Plato
programme.desc: Plato, the philosopher of Athens, questioned life, truth, and society, leaving ideas that still shape the world.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 19
programme.desc: Discover a mix of comforting and traditional flavors in this episode, starting with Pomilorotiania (scrambled eggs with tomato), a simple yet satisfying dish, and finishing with Mahallepi, a creamy and delicate milk pudding. A delightful pairing of savory simplicity and sweet indulgence.

programme.desc: Med Nations 09 Slovenia

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Athens
programme.desc: Malini explores the ancient city of Athens, Greece. Once steeped in history, Athens has experienced a modern rebirth, now thriving with creativity, modern Greek gastronomy, a vibrant contemporary art scene, and unmatched nightlife.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We'll explore flamboyant Sevilla, where orange trees ring lacy palaces, bullfighting is still a cultural event, and little girls dream of growing up to become flamenco dancers.

This powerful documentary reveals stunning images of the sea’s beauty and the urgent struggle to protect it, offering a moving portrait of our relationship with nature.

programme.title: Io Ti Cerchero
programme.desc: The investigation into Ettore's death reaches a critical juncture. The authorities have apprehended two suspects, and their convictions seem imminent. However, Valerio, Sara, the prosecutor, and Ettore's friends remain unconvinced of their guilt. They continue to harbour doubts, believing that the true circumstances of Ettore's death have yet to be uncovered.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos

programme.title: Vivi e lascia vivere
programme.desc: Laura faces mounting pressure as she juggles her secret past with her new business, while her children begin to suspect she’s hiding something. Toni reappears, bringing old emotions and new dangers that threaten her fresh start. As conflicts rise, Laura must navigate between protecting her family and confronting her past. Meanwhile, a shocking revelation forces her to make a life-altering decision.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Luisi Malofeev Torino 2021
programme.desc: ​In May 2021, pianist Alexander Malofeev joined conductor Fabio Luisi and the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai for a performance at Turin's Auditorium RAI Arturo Toscanini. The program featured Franz Liszt's Piano Concerto No. 1 in E-flat major and Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 6 in B minor, "Pathétique." Malofeev's interpretation of Liszt's concerto was particularly noted for its expressive depth and technical prowess.​

programme.title: Malini Angelica Andalucia
programme.desc: Join Angelica Malini on an unforgettable journey through Andalucía, southern Spain’s most colorful and captivating region, as they explore Cordoba and Cadiz. Famous for flamenco, tapas, and stunning Moorish architecture, Andalucía’s rich history comes alive here. In Cordoba, the host marvels at the breathtaking Mezquita, a grand mosque turned cathedral. In Cadiz, an ancient Phoenician city, they soak in sweeping Atlantic views and a corniche with hints of North Africa. This episode immerses viewers in the culture, history, and vibrant spirit of one of Spain’s most enchanting regions.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: When Rome was little more than a village, Athens was already laying the foundations of Western civilization. And today, amid its rich heritage, Greece’s vibrant capital continues to thrive.

programme.title: OSN Kubrick - Musica e cinema d'autore
programme.desc: From the Rai Arturo Toscanini Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Min Chung, presents a symphonic concert dedicated to the iconic soundtracks from Stanley Kubrick's films. The programme features orchestral interpretations of memorable scores that have shaped Kubrick's cinematic legacy, blending classical masterpieces with evocative film music for a powerful and immersive experience.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Napoli
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Naples, in Italy’s vibrant Campania region. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. With its authenticity and energy, Naples stands out as one of Italy’s most captivating cities.

programme.title: Whats On Special and Unique Festivals
programme.desc: From Malta to Morocco, unique festivals capture Mediterranean creativity. Malta hosts the Valletta Green Festival, Notte Bianca, Malta Air Show, and Gharb International Kite and Wind Festival. Portugal celebrates with Festa das Cruzes, Morocco Dream City Festival dazzles with arts and music, Croatia brings the avant garde MoDem Festival, and Italy hosts the historic Venice Debutante Grand Ball. These festivals showcase the extraordinary, the festive, and the unforgettable.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: Med Nations 03 Turkey
programme.desc: Turkey, where cultures, continents, and centuries of history all come together. Turkey has a lot of different traditions, flavours, and history that have been shaped by powerful empires and cultural crossroads that have been around for hundreds of years. You can see this from the busy streets of Istanbul to the sunny Mediterranean coast.

programme.title: Mediterranean Yoga Slow Down and Breathe
programme.desc: Mediterranean Yoga is a series that blends Embodiment Yoga with the peaceful beauty of the Mediterranean. Set in stunning coastal and natural locations, each episode encourages viewers to reconnect mind and body through gentle movement, breathwork, and mindfulness in a safe and calming space.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Bronzi di Riace il tesoro ritrovato
programme.desc: Calabria, a land steeped in myths, reveals its secrets through the Riace Bronzes. Restorer Cosimo Schepis shares the story of these ancient treasures, 50 years after their discovery. Actress Swamy Rotolo and her sister Grecia journey through Calabria, uncovering its hidden gems. A captivating exploration of the myths and legacy of Magna Grecia.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Experiencing Madrid at its fun-loving best, we stare down a flamenco dancer, nibble pigs' ears, and ogle lavish palaces before side-tripping for some unforgettable history.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Be it recipes that evolved from hunting or dishes that were prepared as offerings to god, Alex uncovers the secrets of royal Bagheli cuisine.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: Dramatic views of the Pacific Ocean, brightly colored colonial buildings, world-class cuisine – the capital city of Peru, Lima has a lot going for it. Milagros reveals the treasures of her home city from the diverse neighborhoods, like the upscale Miraflores to the bohemian Barranco. She also shows a side of Lima where one can enjoy fun adventures with the marine creatures.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: In a 48-hour escape from boardrooms and deadlines, Sukruti finds herself in the enchanting city of pearls: Hyderabad.

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: Elisha is on a trip to Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart, whose legacy still echoes throughout Salzburg’s Baroque residences, auditoriums and dining halls. Paying her respects at the renowned composer’s memorial, and attending a musical based on the story of the Von Trapp family, she finds herself starstruck by the rich musical heritage of this charming city.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: In the last leg of her journey, Milagros goes to Trujillo, where she introduces the flavors of the northern region of Peru and also Marinera – the sensuous national dance. But the highlight in Trujillo are the forgotten sites like Chan Chan and Huaca del Moche, where secrets from Peru’s pre-Incan past begin to unfold.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries some of the signature spa treatments of the Shangri La Resort at Kota Kinabalu in Sabah, Malaysia.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: In the last leg of her journey, Milagros goes to Trujillo, where she introduces the flavors of the northern region of Peru and also Marinera – the sensuous national dance. But the highlight in Trujillo are the forgotten sites like Chan Chan and Huaca del Moche, where secrets from Peru’s pre-Incan past begin to unfold.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: When Yogita’s business plans in Bengaluru unravel, she ends up with 48 hours of leisure and no idea what to do in the city. Enter Shruti – her friend, and a diehard fan of the city she calls home. From quiet mornings in one of Bengaluru’s many parks to lively evenings at one of its many breweries, from rustic Kannada feasts to thrilling adventures – Shruti wants Yogita to experience it all. But are two days enough for her to make Yogita fall in love with the city that has captured her heart?

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: While learning to prepare a Naga pork delicacy, Alex gets an understanding of the different dishes and cooking styles of Nagaland’s tribes.

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: On a trip to Innsbruck, Elisha is instantly charmed by the Old Town, where she feasts her eyes on the city’s iconic attractions. From the famous ‘Golden Roof’ to the Imperial Church, the monuments she visits reveal to her stories of a 15th century emperor, under whose reign the city had reached its zenith.

programme.title: Unplanned Trip
programme.desc: Crisp mountain breezes, lush greenery and gurgling streams – Roing is a town that entices Roshni to explore it on foot. A visit to the local market leads to her sampling an infamous chilli that has reduced seasoned foodies to tears. Later on, she takes a tour of the “Orange Bowl of Arunachal Pradesh”.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Moeen, a travel enthusiast, goes for a short getaway to the Closenberg Hotel in Galle, an 18th century Dutch walled town in Sri Lanka with grand colonial houses and beautiful beaches. At the resort, he chances upon a traditional Sri Lankan wedding, which offers him a glimpse of the country’s traditions and cuisine.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: At Maya Ubud Spa Resort, Jamie Srubis tries different spa treatments that induce the same tranquility which Bali does.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Unplanned Trip
programme.desc: Roshni goes to the adventure hub of Arunachal Pradesh – Mechuka. Getting a bird’s eye view of the mountains and ziplining across breathtaking vistas gives her an intense adrenaline rush that instantly makes her besotted with the town.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Xplore Oman
programme.desc: From the limestone formations of Wadi Bani Khaled to the ocean of dunes at Wahiba Sands, Elisha gets a taste of Oman’s natural heritage.

programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries some of the signature spa treatments of the Shangri La Resort at Kota Kinabalu in Sabah, Malaysia.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: While cooking the local fish of the Jaintia region of Meghalaya, Alex also gets acquainted with the culinary heritage of Sylhet in Bangladesh.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Located in the North Malé Atoll of Maldives, the Reethi Rah resort is the perfect combination of island life mixed with world-class luxury.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Indeya unwinds at Earl’s Regency, exploring its spiritual and cultural aspects. She visits a wildlife sanctuary, tries traditional meal and ending with exploring the surroundings of Kandy lake.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: From the impact of maritime trade and the European Renaissance on Portugal in the 15th century to the nationwide Romanticism movement in the 19th century, the heritage sites of Portugal such as Jeronimo Monastery and Pena Palace reveal various stages of the country’s evolution.

programme.title: Xplore Oman
programme.desc: Apart from deserts, Oman also has majestic, rust-colored mountain ranges, which quietly hold the country’s history in them.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: In Kolkata, Alex meets Rajiv Neogi and Siddhartha Bose, food experts who introduce her to some of the forgotten dishes of Bengali cuisine.

programme.title: Bliss
programme.desc: With its submerged caldera, black sand beaches and purple sunsets, Santorini is the archetypal Greek island fantasy.

programme.title: Best From The Rest
programme.desc: A playground of steel and glass skyscrapers iced in a rainbow of neon lights and silhouetted against towering green mountain peaks, Hong Kong sets the stage for envy-inducing social media moments. Beyond the glamour, however, lies the authentic richness that makes it truly unforgettable. Here is a guide to some of the most iconic natural and cultural attractions that could help you to get up, close and personal with the beating heart of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Unplanned Trip
programme.desc: Roshni’s journey gets off to a rocky start, when she encounters a flat tyre on her way to Jairampur. To add to her disappointment, she realizes that she is in the town on the one day when everything around is shut. When she sets out to explore the attractions in the vicinity, however, she chances upon a World War II cemetery, which narrates riveting stories about the famous Stilwell Road. Suddenly, her day picks up.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: An opera house, which once resounded with the tunes of musical legends, a palace, which was a gift to an empress from her father: the magnificent relics of Vienna’s imperial past have many stories hidden in their walls.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Cutting-edge architecture, world-class restaurants, high-end retail, fantastical theme parks, electric nightlife – Singapore is a playground for hedonists and jetsetters. With just 48 hours on hand, London-based adventurer, Natalie Gayle has set out to explore the true character of the city. As she masters the art of the Singapore Sling, finds hidden mangrove kayaking spots and tucks into Michelin star street food, the Lion City reveals its many sides to her in the span of a weekend.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: From a traditional Awadhi korma to Rewa’s famous Mutton Bandhwesh, Alex explores the vast and complex culinary culture of India’s royal kitchens.

programme.desc: In the rugged heart of the Peruvian Andes, Milagros sets out on an exhilarating adventure in Huascaran National Park.

programme.title: Unplanned Trip
programme.desc: Roshni visits a land of lush green paddy fields and gentle rivers, of traditional bamboo houses and Buddhist temples – Namsai in Arunachal Pradesh. The highlight of this idyllic town, the Golden Pagoda, leaves her spellbound. Here, she spends a day with the monks and finds out the secret behind the peaceful lives they lead.

programme.title: Unplanned Trip
programme.desc: On a visit to Hawai, the land of the Mishmi tribe, Roshni meets a tribe member who teaches her how to catch fish. Later that day, she stays at the house of a Mishmi family, and they treat her to a local drink that makes her shed her inhibitions and open up to them in no time.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: Elisha is on a trip to Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart, whose legacy still echoes throughout Salzburg’s Baroque residences, auditoriums and dining halls. programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries some of the signature spa treatments of the Shangri La Resort at Kota Kinabalu in Sabah, Malaysia.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: In the last leg of her journey, Milagros goes to Trujillo, where she introduces the flavors of the northern region of Peru and also Marinera – the sensuous national dance. But the highlight in Trujillo are the forgotten sites like Chan Chan and Huaca del Moche, where secrets from Peru’s pre-Incan past begin to unfold.

programme.title: Unplanned Trip
programme.desc: Crisp mountain breezes, lush greenery and gurgling streams – Roing is a town that entices Roshni to explore it on foot. A visit to the local market leads to her sampling an infamous chilli that has reduced seasoned foodies to tears. Later on, she takes a tour of the “Orange Bowl of Arunachal Pradesh”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Xplore Austria
programme.desc: On a trip to Innsbruck, Elisha is instantly charmed by the Old Town, where she feasts her eyes on the city’s iconic attractions. From the famous ‘Golden Roof’ to the Imperial Church, the monuments she visits reveal to her stories of a 15th century emperor, under whose reign the city had reached its zenith.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: At Maya Ubud Spa Resort, Jamie Srubis tries different spa treatments that induce the same tranquility which Bali does.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: While learning to prepare a Naga pork delicacy, Alex gets an understanding of the different dishes and cooking styles of Nagaland’s tribes.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Moeen, a travel enthusiast, goes for a short getaway to the Closenberg Hotel in Galle, an 18th century Dutch walled town in Sri Lanka with grand colonial houses and beautiful beaches. At the resort, he chances upon a traditional Sri Lankan wedding, which offers him a glimpse of the country’s traditions and cuisine.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: From traditional smoked pork in Nagaland to frog meat in Shillong, Alex finds out the secrets of tribal cuisine in Nagaland.

programme.title: Xplore Oman
programme.desc: From the magnificent Sultan Qaboos Grand Mosque to the enchanting Muttrah Souq, Elisha experiences the classic Arabic charms of Oman, in Muscat.

programme.title: Unplanned Trip
programme.desc: Did you know one of the world’s most expensive varieties of tea is produced in Arunachal Pradesh? Roshni attends a tea festival at the Donyi Polo Tea Estate in Pasighat, where she gets a chance to savour some of the most premium varieties of tea produced in the state.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From swimming in the ocean to relishing a traditional Maldivian lobster curry, Kim experiences the true meaning of joie de vivre at Reethi Rah.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Shirodhara is a traditional Ayurvedic oil drip treatment that popular world traveler, Jamie Srubis tries at the Mines Wellness Resort in Malaysia. Following this, she tries other treatments such as Urut Melayu, a full body massage which derives its technique from a traditional Malay martial art, and Acupuncture and Moxibustion, the two oldest treatments of Traditional Chinese Medicine.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.desc: From traditional smoked pork in Nagaland to frog meat in Shillong, Alex finds out the secrets of tribal cuisine in Nagaland.
